hooks.command:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const cwd=process.cwd();const hasRegistry=fs.existsSync(p.join(cwd,'.repo-orchestrator/registry.json'));if(hasRegistry)process.exit(0);const entries=fs.readdirSync(cwd,{withFileTypes:true});const hasSubRepo=entries.some(e=>e.isDirectory()&&fs.existsSync(p.join(cwd,e.name,'.git')));if(!hasSubRepo)process.exit(0);process.stdout.write('┌── repo-orchestrator ───────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ⚠️  No registry found in this workspace.                  │
│                                                              │
│  First time here?                                             │
│    /repo-orch-setup   → guided install + bootstrap           │
│    /repo-orch-init    → skip wizard, bootstrap directly       │
│                                                              │
│  Already set up elsewhere?                                    │
│    cd into your workspace root and restart Claude Code.       │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
');"

node -e "const cmd=(JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT||'{}')).command||'';const banned=[/\brm\s/,/\bmv\s/,/\bcp\s.*-[^-]*r/i,/\bsed\s+-i/,/\btee\s/,/\btruncate\s/,/git\s+commit/,/git\s+push/,/git\s+add/,/git\s+reset/,/git\s+checkout\s+--/,/git\s+clean/,/\bchmod\s/,/\bchown\s/,/\bmkdir\s/,/\btouch\s/,/\bwrite\b/i,/\bnpx\s+.*rm/,/>\s*[^&]/];const hit=banned.find(r=>r.test(cmd));if(hit){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'repo-orchestrator safety: write-like command blocked in specialist/subagent context: '+cmd.slice(0,120)}));process.exit(0);}"
